name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Bonnie Rabbit And Rodent Food 750g
description: INGREDIENTS: Clover Pellet, Wheat, Barley, Oat, Corn, Sunflower Seed, Pea, Carob. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: Per each pet, for Rabbits 40-50 gr (4-5 tablespoon), for Guinea Pig 35 -40 gr (3-4 tablespoon), for Hamster 10-15 gr (1-1,5 tablespoon) daily. Feed rabbits and rodents regularly. Remember to ensure that they have free access to the feed and fresh drinking water.
